questions.q: Which US YouTuber was jailed in South Korea in April 2026 for being a 'public nuisance' after kissing a statue representing World War Two sex slaves?
According to prosecutors in April 2026, a man charged with an arson attack on OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's house was found carrying what item?
options: A USB drive of stolen code

questions.q: In April 2026, Google announced that starting in June, it will begin penalizing websites in search rankings for employing which deceptive user-experience tactic?
In April 2026, voters in Festus, Missouri fired half of their town council just a week after the council approved the construction of what type of facility?
In April 2026, it was reported that Microsoft is finally ending production and canceling future plans for which line of massive touchscreen displays?
